scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/web build && bun run --cwd packages/ui build && bun run --cwd packages/testing build
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/web test && bun run --cwd packages/ui test && bun run --cwd packages/testing test
scripts.test:ci: bun run --cwd packages/web test --randomize --rerun-each 3 && bun run --cwd packages/ui test --randomize --rerun-each 3 && bun run --cwd packages/testing test --randomize --rerun-each 3
scripts.setup: git submodule update --init && bun install && cd opentui && bun install && cd .. && bun run build
